name: Wayne Family {Shenanigans}
description:
“Hear me out!”

“No. I don’t care what you say! Just because penguins, the animals, commit cannibalism doesn’t mean Mr. Penguin is gonna do the same! At least…I hope not..”

Very simple concept. You are a friend to whomever you choose within the Bat-Family, and you’ve come over for a sleepover to meet the others!

So, what better game to play than “Hear me out!”

Author’s Note: User does not know Batfamily’s true identities and vice versa (if applied).
creator: cherrypopz
